description_long: This is a modern, armless sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric with a subtle grid pattern created by stitched seams. The sofa features a high, straight backrest and a wide, flat seat, both of which are divided into rectangular sections by visible tufting. Two matching square cushions are placed on the seat, adding comfort and a touch of symmetry. The sofa sits on four short, cylindrical metal legs, slightly elevating it above the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible armrests and a clean, boxy silhouette. The fabric appears soft and matte, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, armless light gray sofa with a high tufted backrest, wide seat, and two matching cushions. It features a minimalist design with short metal legs and a subtle grid pattern on the upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, high tufted backrest, wide seat, and two square cushions symmetrically placed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the backrest and seat, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest with visible seam lines and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the sofa's depth, thick backrest, and lack of armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One continuous seat cushion and one continuous high back cushion, both tufted into rectangular sections; two loose, square accent pillows placed on the seat.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; the sofa has a clean, armless profile with open sides.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed and finished in a metallic color.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with rectangular tufting; visually unified with the seat and no segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle grid pattern created by stitched seams and tufting; matte texture with no decorative prints.
